blocks.text: Rear differential removal
1. Lift Set
2. Rear differential fluid removal
3. Exhaust pipe/silencer removal
4. No.2 propeller shaft removal
Align mark (C) at the connection between No.2 propeller shaft (A) and rear differential (B). Remove the four bolts (D) and disconnect the No. 2 propeller shaft from the rear differential.
5. Breather hose disconnect
Disconnect the breather hose (B) from the rear differential assembly (A).
6. Rear differential jack up
Support the rear differential assembly with a jack.
7. Rear differential mounting rubber A Remove
Remove the rear differential mounting rubber A mounting bolt (B).
8. Rear differential mount assembly B removal
Remove the rear differential mount assembly.B Remove the mounting bolts (A) and plate (C).
9. Rear drive shaft inboard joint removal
While lowering the rear differential assembly (A), pull out the inboard joints (B) one on each side.

items: Be careful not to damage the oil seal (C).
To prevent the roller from coming off the drive shaft joint, secure the rear differential assembly with string or other means after removing the rear differential assembly.

items.text: Be careful not to damage the oil seal (C).
Be careful not to damage the oil seal (C).
To prevent the roller from coming off the drive shaft joint, secure the rear differential assembly with string or other means after removing the rear differential assembly.
To prevent the roller from coming off the drive shaft joint, secure the rear differential assembly with string or other means after removing the rear differential assembly.

blocks.text: 10. Set Ring Removal
Remove the set ring (B) from the rear driveshaft inboard joint (A).
11. Mount, bracket removal
Remove the rear differential mount bracket A and rear differential mount assembly B from the rear differential assembly (C).

items: Be sure to follow the assembly procedure, as it may cause abnormal noise or worsening of noise and vibration.

blocks.text: 1. Mount, bracket Mounting

Install the rear differential mount assembly B to the rear differential assembly (C) and tighten the new bolts. Install rear differential mount bracket A and tighten new bolts. Replace the flange nut (D) with a new one and tighten temporarily.
2. Set Ring Mounting
Install the new set ring (A) into the rear driveshaft inboard joint groove (B).
3. Rear differential jack up
Support the rear differential assembly with a jack.
4. Rear Drive Shaft Inboard Joint Installation
Raise the rear differential assembly (B) to the mounting position while inserting the inboard joints (A) one on each side.

items: Be careful not to damage the oil seal (C).

blocks.text: Push inboard joint (C) until set ring (A) "clicks" into mounting groove (B).
5. Rear differential mount assembly.B Tentatively tightened
Tighten the rear differential mount assembly B mounting bolts (A) and plate (C) temporarily.
6. Rear Differential Mounting Rubber A Tentatively tightened
Temporarily tighten the rear differential mounting rubber A mounting bolt (B). Tighten the flange nut (C).
7. Rear differential mount assembly.B Tighten
Tighten the rear differential mount assembly B mounting bolt (A).
8. Rear Differential Mounting Rubber A Tighten
Tighten the rear differential mounting rubber A mounting bolt (B).
9. Breather Hose Connections
Connect the breather hose (A) to the rear differential assembly (B). Install the breather hose so that the paint mark (C) faces straight up.
10. No. 2 propeller shaft installation
Align the No. 2 propeller shaft (A) with the alignment mark (C) on the rear differential (B). Tighten four new 12-point bolts (D).
11. Exhaust pipe/silencer installation
12. Rear differential fluid refill
